name: python3-phpserialize
title: python3-phpserialize
summary: Python port of PHP serialize and unserialize functions (Python 3)
description:
Python port of PHP serialize and unserialize functions (Python 3)
This module implements the Python serialization interface (eg: provides dumps,
loads and similar functions).
.
This package contains phpserialize for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-phpserialize because Python port of PHP serialize and unserialize functions (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-phpserialize as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-phpserialize with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-phpserialize --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
